sqlReaderQuery.value:
select t1.* from (select -- ap.* 
ap.id
,ap.hcProviderLocationId
,ap.tblMemberId
,ap.CreatedBy
,ap.ModifiedBy
,ap.DateCreated
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateDeleted
,ap.DeletedBy
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 	
inner join dbo.tblMember tm on (tm.id =ap.tblmemberId    )
--inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (ap.memberId=p.id ) 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (tm.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')})
)t1
left join Temp_hcStaffMemberLocation t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
WHERE t2.ID IS NULL
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select -- ap.* 
ap.id
,ap.tblMemberId
,ap.hcStaffPaycodeId
,ap.hcStaffMemberPayrollTypeId
,ap.Rate
,ap.CreatedBy
,ap.DateCreated
,ap.ModifiedBy
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateDeleted
,ap.isDefaultBillableAppointment
,ap.isDefaultNonBillableAppointment
,ap.isDefaultTravelAppointment
,ap.EffectiveDate
,ap.EndDate
,ap.DeletedBy
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 	
inner join dbo.tblMember tm on (tm.id =ap.tblmemberId    )
--inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (ap.memberId=p.id ) 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (tm.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) 
)t1
left join Temp_hcStaffMemberPayroll t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID

WHERE t2.ID IS NULL
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select 
h.id
,h.tblMemberId
,h.certificatName
,h.certificatNumber
,h.employeeTypeId
,h.titleTypeId
,h.npiNumber
,h.supervisorId
,h.CreatedBy
,h.ModifiedBy
,h.DateCreated
,h.DateLastModified
,h.DateDeleted
,h.isActive
,h.hcStaffCertificationId
,h.GenderTypeId
,h.StartDate
,h.CanHanddleAgression
,h.NumberOfClients
,h.HourlyRate
,h.AuthorizedHourPerWeek
,h.BillableTargetPercent
,h.BillableHoursTarget
,h.DateOfBirth
,h.MonthExperience
,h.AddressId
,h.Salary
,h.hcStaffExperienceTypeId
,h.hcTimezoneId
,h.hcStaffStatusId
,h.ShowRbt
,h.IsNonExempt
,h.ShowScheduling
,h.CompanyStaffID
,h.TaxonomyCode
,h.practitionerId
,h.MedicaidIdNumber
,h.CareGiverJson
,h.BacbId
,h.ByPassNpiRequirements
,h.FirstLocationId
,h.AreInteractionsLogging
,h.DeletedBy
,h.ShowBhAnalyticsClinical
,h.ShowBhAnalyticsPracticeManagement
,h.ShowBhAnalyticsBasicCharts
,h.ShowAutismAnalytica
,h.ShowEssentialsForLiving
,h.ShowAttendBehavior
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} h 
inner join dbo.tblMember t on (h.tblmemberid=t.id)
inner join accountinfo a on (t.accountinfoid=a.id)
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')})-- and  IsNull(h.IsMigrated,0) = 0
)t1
left join Temp_hcStaffMember t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
WHERE t2.ID IS NULL
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select --ap.* 
ap.id
,ap.accountInfoId
,ap.[name]
,ap.[description]
,ap.roleTypeId
,ap.CreatedBy
,ap.ModifiedBy
,ap.DateCreated
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateDeleted
,ap.DeletedBy
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap		
inner join AccountInfo a on (a.ID=ap.accountInfoId  )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) 
)t1
left join Temp_hcStaffTitle t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
WHERE t2.ID IS NULL
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select  --ap.* 
ap.Id
,ap.TypeId
,ap.WorkAreaId
,ap.EntryTypeId
,ap.AutomatedTypeId
,ap.Title
,ap.[Description]
,ap.AssignedToId
,ap.CreatedById
,ap.CreatedOn
,ap.ClientId
,ap.DueDate
,ap.CompletedOn
,ap.ExpirationDate
,ap.ReferenceId
,ap.ReferenceTypeId
,ap.ViewedOn
,ap.ModifiedBy
,ap.DeletedBy
,ap.DateDeleted
,ap.DateLastModified
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 
            			        inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (ap.Referenceid=p.id ) 
								inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (p.accountInfoId=a.ID )
 where ReferenceId is not null
 and a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) 
 )t1
left join Temp_hcTasks t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
WHERE t2.ID IS NULL
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (      
select DISTINCT
ap.id
      ,ap.referenceId
      ,ap.referenceTypeId
      ,ap.tableName
      ,ap.hcTransactionTypeId
      ,ap.transactionOn
      ,ap.transactionBy
      ,ap.ModifiedBy
      ,ap.DeletedBy
      ,ap.CreatedBy
      ,ap.DateDeleted
      ,ap.DateLastModified
      ,ap.DateCreated
      ,ap.[Action]
      ,ap.storageId
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 	    
inner join dbo.tblmember tm on(tm.id= transactionBy  )
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (tm.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where referenceTypeId in (3,5,6,7)
and a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')})
)t1
left join Temp_hcTransaction t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
WHERE t2.ID IS NULL

select DISTINCT ap.id 
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 	    
inner join dbo.tblmember tm on(tm.id= transactionBy  )
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (tm.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where referenceTypeId in (3,5,6,7)
and a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')})

select t1.* from (select --ap.* 
ap.Id
,ap.TypeId
,ap.StatusId
,ap.ReferenceId
,ap.CreatedDate
,ap.ExpirationDate
,ap.UpdatedBy
,ap.DeletedBy
,ap.CreatedBy
,ap.DateDeleted
,ap.DateLastModified
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 
inner join dbo.hcAppointments ha on (ap.referenceId=ha.appointmentid ) 
            			        inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (ha.clientId=p.id ) 
								inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (p.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')})

)t1
left join Temp_hcWorkflowHistory t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
WHERE t2.ID IS NULL
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select --ap.* 
ap.id
,ap.accountInfoId
,ap.[name]
,ap.[description]
,ap.CreatedBy
,ap.ModifiedBy
,ap.DateCreated
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateDeleted
,ap.DeletedBy
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (ap.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')})
 )t1
left join Temp_hcemployeetype t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
WHERE t2.ID IS NULL
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select --ap.* 
ap.accountInfoId
,ap.subscriberId
,ap.dateCreated
,ap.dateLastModified
,ap.dateDeleted
,ap.parentId
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 			
inner join AccountInfo a on (a.ID=ap.accountInfoId  )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')})
)t1
left join Temp_hollowAccountInfoSubscriber t2 on t1.accountInfoId = t2.accountInfoId AND t1.subscriberId = t2.subscriberId
WHERE t2.accountInfoId IS NULL AND t2.subscriberId IS NULL
select accountInfoId,subscriberId from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select --ap.* 
ap.accountInfoId
,ap.hollowSubscriberID
,ap.hollowCaregiverID
,ap.dateCreated
,ap.dateLastModified
,ap.dateDeleted
,ap.memberID
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 			
inner join AccountInfo a on (a.ID=ap.accountInfoId  )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) 
)t1
left join Temp_hollowAccountLeaderRole6 t2 on t1.accountInfoId = t2.accountInfoId AND t1.memberID = t2.memberID
WHERE t2.accountInfoId IS NULL AND t2.memberID IS NULL
select accountInfoId,memberID from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select -- ap.* 
ap.id
,ap.hollowSubscriberId
,ap.masteryPreference
,ap.[Value]
,ap.DateCreated
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateDeleted
,ap.accountInfoId
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 
inner join	dbo.hollowAccountInfoSubscriber hs on (ap.hollowsubscriberid=hs.subscriberId) 			
inner join AccountInfo a on (a.ID=hs.accountInfoId  )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) 
)t1
left join Temp_hollowAccountMasteryCriteria t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
WHERE t2.ID IS NULL
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select ap.id
,ap.firstName
,ap.lastName
,ap.homePhone
,ap.cellPhone
,ap.memberId
,ap.childRelationshipId
,ap.childRelationshipText
,ap.photoLocation
,ap.DateCreated
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateDeleted
,ap.childRelationshipOrgId 
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 			
inner join dbo.tblMember tm on (tm.id =ap.memberId    )
--inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (ap.memberId=p.id ) 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (tm.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')})
)t1
left join Temp_hollowCaregiver t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
WHERE t2.ID IS NULL
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select  --ap.*
ap.id
,ap.childProfileId
,ap.lessonId
,ap.masteryPreference
,ap.[value]
,ap.DateCreated
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateDeleted
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 							
inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (ap.childProfileId=p.id ) 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (p.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) 
)t1
left join Temp_hollowChildProfileLessonMasteryCriteria t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
WHERE t2.ID IS NULL
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select   ap.childProfileId
,ap.lessonId
,ap.lessonStatusId
,ap.DateMastered
,ap.DateCreated
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateDeleted
,ap.dateSkipped
,ap.dateLessonReadded
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 							
inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (ap.childProfileId=p.id ) 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (p.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')})
)t1
left join Temp_hollowChildProfileLessonStatus t2 on t1.childProfileId = t2.childProfileId AND t1.lessonId = t2.lessonId
WHERE t2.childProfileId IS NULL AND  t2.lessonId IS NULL
select childProfileId,lessonId from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select 
ap.rptId
,ap.ChildProfileId
,ap.LessonId
,ap.inCurrentPlan
,ap.IepGoalId
,ap.Iepgoal_DateDeleted
,ap.IepObjectiveId
,ap.Seq
,ap.ObjectiveText
,ap.DateCreated
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateDeleted
,ap.DateMastered
,ap.masteryValue
,ap.ObjectiveType
,ap.ChildAccountInfoId
,ap.ChildAccountType
,ap.ChildL3AccountId
,ap.ChildL2AccountId
,ap.ChildL1AccountId
,ap.MonthYear
,ap.Year
,ap.WeekYear
,ap.WeekFirstDay
,ap.DateMasteredMonthYear
,ap.DateMasteredYear
,ap.DateMasteredWeekYear
,ap.DateMasteredWeekFirstDay
,ap.DateMasteredChildAccountInfoId
,ap.DateMasteredChildAccountType
,ap.DateMasteredChildL3AccountId
,ap.DateMasteredChildL2AccountId
,ap.DateMasteredChildL1AccountId
,ap.consecutiveDays
,ap.ModifiedBy
,ap.DeletedBy
,ap.CreatedBy
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap
 inner join dbo.ChildProfile c  on (ap.childprofileid=c.id)
 inner join accountinfo a on (c.accountinfoid=a.id)
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')})
)t1
left join Temp_rptObjectives t2 on t1.rptId = t2.rptId
WHERE t2.rptId IS NULL
select rptId from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}
